checkin.journal:
Made a covid test and it was positive, crazy, slept very long - grass mowers in the morning - felt sick and muscles hurt
The choice isn't to move on—life moves whether I want it to or not. No, the choice is to look forward.
Feeling a bit under the weather but considering all it was fine, last corona striked me much more unless its gonna get worse
Inspired by: jpm working much more stable now which is great
Didnt like: that I have covid
Idea: do some Milos exercises too in the morning
